Bypass.comment_K_vs: Hydrualic conductivity fully open valve not 0.000597 [kg/s/Pa^0.5]
Bypass.comment_P_band: Proportional band for the valve control [°C]
Bypass.comment_max_rate: Maximum rate of change of the valve position [1/s] (1/120)
Bypass.comment_steps: Number of discrete steps for the valve position (0 for continuous)
Bypass.comment_Kvleak_bool: Boolean indicating whether to use a Kvleak approach
